title: $1 million raised for Ossoff in Georgia Senate race against Collins
shortDescription: Democratic Sen. Jon Ossoff raised $1 million on the first day of his general election campaign against Mike Collins for a Georgia Senate seat.

title: Trump speaks out against DC Mayoral race frontrunner, Lewis George
shortDescription: President Donald Trump spoke out against frontrunner and D.C. Council member Janeese Lewis George ahead of Tuesday's primary.

title: DC mayor candidate Janeese Lewis George’s views on Trump, explained
shortDescription: DC mayoral candidate Janeese Lewis George has pushed back on Donald Trump’s criticism and said where she’s willing to work with his administration.

title: Inside the NY Democratic primary race to unseat Mike Lawler in Congress
shortDescription: Five Democrats seeking to challenge GOP Rep. Mike Lawler are on the June 23 ballot in a primary for a key swing district in New York's Hudson Valley.

title: Trump says Reflecting Pool was vandalized. Here's what we know
shortDescription: President Trump has said that numerous people have been arrested for vandalizing DC's algae-plagued Reflecting Pool. Here's what we know.

title: Vance meets Iranian officials as Trump threatens more attacks
shortDescription: Vice President JD Vance met with Iranian officials, while President Donald Trump threatened renewed strikes over Hezbollah and the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Biden loses bid to block release of memoir audio
shortDescription: A judge said public interest and FOIA transparency outweigh former President Joe Biden’s privacy concerns, requiring release of the memoir recordings.

title: Trump says British Prime Minister will step down
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said that British Prime Minister Keir Starmer will step down in a Truth Social post.

title: Supreme Court faces new wave of cases over state election laws
shortDescription: The Supreme Court is considering new appeals regarding voting laws in Arkansas, Texas, Arizona and Pennsylvania.

title: Trump says Reflecting Pool needs repairs, blames 'terrible Vandals'
shortDescription: President Trump said more people have been arrested for vandalism of the Reflecting Pool, which now likely needs to be drained and repaired again.

title: Biden loses bid to block release of memoir audio recordings
shortDescription: Judge allows DOJ to release Biden memoir audio to Heritage Foundation, rejecting bid to block disclosure; Biden plans appeal.
